chapters.title: Getting Started with R
chapters.description: Install R and RStudio, write your first code, and learn the basics of the R environment.

chapters.title: Basic Data Types and Operations
chapters.description: Explore R's fundamental data types: numeric, character, logical, and how to work with them.

chapters.title: Vectors and Vectorized Operations
chapters.description: Master the workhorse of R: vectors. Learn creation, indexing, and efficient vectorized computations.

chapters.title: Matrices and Arrays
chapters.description: Dive into two-dimensional and multi-dimensional data structures in R.

chapters.title: Lists
chapters.description: Learn about R's flexible list structure, which can hold elements of different types.

chapters.title: Data Frames
chapters.description: Get comfortable with the most common data structure for statistical analysis: data frames.

chapters.title: Factors and Categorical Data
chapters.description: Understand how R handles categorical variables with factors.

chapters.title: Control Flow: Conditionals and Loops
chapters.description: Add logic to your R scripts with if-else statements and loops.

chapters.title: Functions
chapters.description: Write your own functions to automate repetitive tasks and organize code.

chapters.title: Data Manipulation with dplyr
chapters.description: Learn the powerful dplyr package for filtering, selecting, mutating, and summarizing data.

chapters.title: Data Visualization with ggplot2
chapters.description: Create beautiful and informative plots with the ggplot2 package.

chapters.title: Importing/Exporting Data and Final Project
chapters.description: Load data from files, save your results, and combine everything in a final mini-project.
